meta.title: HPB-TCT Trading Bot — Complete Operational Workflow Logic Map
meta.description: Machine-readable hierarchical map of all decision logic in the Schematics-5B trading engine. Covers HTF→LTF market bias initialization (established at workflow start, referenced by all downstream steps), range validation, liquidity checks, session scaling, counter-bias protection, execution confidence, and trade management.
meta.bias_init_rule: HTF→LTF market bias MUST be established at step 2.0 before any downstream step proceeds. All steps from 3.0 onward receive htf_bias and ltf_bias as required inputs.

workflow.name: AUTO_SCAN_LOOP
workflow.decision_logic: Polling loop that fires every 60 seconds. Acquires async lock to prevent concurrent scans. Checks if a position is already open — if yes, routes to trade management (step 8.0). If no position, proceeds to scan for new setups.
outputs: triggers full pipeline per symbol per MTF timeframe

conditions.gate_position_open: If current_trade is not None → skip to step 8.0 (manage existing position)
conditions.gate_duplicate_cooldown: If same symbol+price (±0.2%) was evaluated within 300s → skip

children.name: HTF_TO_LTF_MARKET_BIAS_INIT
children._annotation: MODIFIED (bias-init enforcement): Renamed from HTF_BIAS_DETERMINATION to HTF_TO_LTF_MARKET_BIAS_INIT. This step is the canonical bias initialization gate for the entire workflow. HTF bias is established first (steps 2.1–2.2), then cascaded to LTF (step 2.3). No downstream step may proceed until both htf_bias and ltf_bias are resolved. Added ltf_bias to outputs.
children.decision_logic: Determines the Higher Time Frame directional bias using 6-candle-rule pivot detection on daily candles. Identifies swing highs and swing lows, then classifies the last two of each to determine market structure direction. Structure break confirmation requires a candle CLOSE beyond the prior swing level. After HTF bias is resolved, derives the aligned LTF bias (step 2.3) before releasing control to step 3.0.

conditions.cache_hit: If cached bias exists and TTL not expired (24h for directional, 1h for neutral) → return cached value without recomputation
conditions.bullish_classification: Last 2 swing highs form Higher High AND last 2 swing lows form Higher Low → 'bullish'
conditions.bearish_classification: Last 2 swing highs form Lower High AND last 2 swing lows form Lower Low → 'bearish'
conditions.structure_break_confirmation: Close beyond prior swing pivot confirms direction; wick-only does not confirm

children.name: SIX_CANDLE_RULE_PIVOT_DETECTION
children.decision_logic: Scans candles for pivot highs and lows using the 6-candle rule: a pivot HIGH requires 2+ consecutive bullish candles followed by 2+ consecutive bearish candles. A pivot LOW requires the inverse. Inside bars (close == open or body < threshold) do NOT count toward the sequence but do NOT break it either.

conditions.min_shoulder_candles: At least 2 consecutive candles in each direction (3-candle shoulder each side)
conditions.inside_bar_handling: Inside bars are skipped — they neither count nor reset the consecutive sequence

children.name: STRUCTURE_CLASSIFICATION
children.decision_logic: Compares the last two swing highs and last two swing lows to classify as HH (Higher High), HL (Higher Low), LH (Lower High), or LL (Lower Low). These four labels determine the bias.

children.name: LTF_BIAS_DERIVATION
children._annotation: NEW (bias-init enforcement): Derives the Lower Time Frame directional bias by applying 6CR pivot detection on the MTF timeframes (4H, 1H, 30M) and aligning the result against the HTF bias established in steps 2.1–2.2. This step completes the HTF→LTF bias cascade and is the last step before the workflow advances to range analysis (step 3.0).
children.decision_logic: Runs 6CR pivot detection on each MTF timeframe (4H, 1H, 30M) to determine LTF market structure. Aligns LTF structure with HTF bias: if HTF is bullish/bearish and LTF confirms the same direction, ltf_bias mirrors htf_bias. If LTF is counter-HTF, ltf_bias is set to 'counter' and downstream gating (steps 6.1, 6.7) applies counter-bias protection. If HTF is 'neutral', ltf_bias inherits 'neutral' and step 6.1 triggers a hard fail in v2.

conditions.aligned: htf_bias == ltf_structure on dominant MTF → ltf_bias = htf_bias
conditions.counter: ltf_structure opposes htf_bias → ltf_bias = 'counter' (triggers RIG gate at step 6.7)
conditions.neutral_inheritance: htf_bias == 'neutral' → ltf_bias = 'neutral' (hard fail in v2 at step 6.1)
conditions.dominant_tf_priority: 4H takes precedence over 1H over 30M when LTF TFs disagree
conditions.cache_ttl: Same TTL rules as htf_bias: 24h for directional, 1h for neutral

children.name: RANGE_FORMATION_AND_VALIDATION
children._annotation: MODIFIED (bias-init enforcement): Added htf_bias and ltf_bias from step 2.0 to inputs. Range search direction (accumulation vs. distribution) is gated on htf_bias + ltf_bias — a bullish bias targets accumulation ranges; bearish targets distribution. A 'neutral' or 'counter' ltf_bias causes this step to log a warning and proceed with reduced confidence.
children.decision_logic: Identifies horizontal consolidation ranges by finding swing high/low boundaries. Calculates Equilibrium (EQ) and Deviation Limits (DL2). Validates that the range is genuinely horizontal (not a V-shaped impulse) and that EQ has been touched.

conditions.EQ_touch_required: At least one candle must close within 5% of EQ — confirms range is being respected
conditions.horizontal_validation: At least 60% of closes must stay within range boundaries AND direction changes ≥ 15% of candle count AND EQ crossings ≥ 10% of candle count
conditions.tap1_identification: Tap1 = first definitive touch of range low (accumulation) or range high (distribution)

children.name: RANGE_QUALITY_SCORING
children.decision_logic: Scores the quality of the identified range by checking horizontal character, liquidity stacking at boundaries, and EQ interaction frequency.

conditions.liquidity_stacking: 2+ equal highs (within 0.1%) at range_high OR 2+ equal lows at range_low → indicates stop-loss clustering
conditions.V_shape_rejection: If most price action is directional with < 15% direction changes → NOT a valid range

children.name: DEVIATION_AND_SCHEMATIC_DETECTION
children._annotation: MODIFIED (bias-init enforcement): Added htf_bias and ltf_bias to inputs. Schematic direction (accumulation vs. distribution) must agree with htf_bias and ltf_bias. A schematic whose direction conflicts with htf_bias is flagged as counter-bias and forwarded to step 6.1 for hard gate evaluation.
children.decision_logic: After identifying Tap1 (first touch of range boundary), searches for Tap2 (first deviation beyond range) and Tap3 (deeper deviation or higher-low retest). Classifies as Model 1 or Model 2 based on the relationship between Tap2 and Tap3. Validates that deviations stay within DL2.

conditions.tap2_requirement: Tap2 = first deviation beyond range boundary that comes BACK inside the range. Must NOT close beyond DL2.
conditions.model_1_classification: Tap3 goes LOWER than Tap2 (accumulation) or HIGHER than Tap2 (distribution) — creates a lower low / higher high outside range
conditions.model_2_classification: Tap3 is a HIGHER LOW relative to Tap2 (accumulation) that grabs extreme liquidity (first MS low after Tap2) OR mitigates extreme demand/supply zone
conditions.DL2_gate: If any candle CLOSES beyond DL2 AND does not get accepted back within 3 candles → TRUE BREAK → schematic INVALID
conditions.tap_spacing_requirement: Time gap between Tap2 and Tap3 must be ≥ 30% of the gap between Tap1 and Tap2
conditions.v2_tolerance: In v2 scoring, allow close slightly beyond DL2 if within 0.3% tolerance (softer gate)

children.name: MODEL_1_DETECTION
children.decision_logic: Searches for a Tap3 that creates a LOWER LOW below Tap2 (for accumulation) or HIGHER HIGH above Tap2 (for distribution). This is the classic spring/upthrust pattern.

conditions.accumulation_model_1: tap3_low < tap2_low AND tap3_close > range_low (accepted back)
conditions.distribution_model_1: tap3_high > tap2_high AND tap3_close < range_high (accepted back)

children.name: MODEL_2_DETECTION
children.decision_logic: Searches for a Tap3 that forms a HIGHER LOW relative to Tap2 (accumulation) — does NOT make new low. Must grab either extreme liquidity (first MS low after Tap2) or mitigate extreme demand zone (S/D).

conditions.liquidity_grab_or_sd: Must satisfy at least one: (a) price reaches extreme liquidity level, OR (b) price enters extreme S/D zone

children.name: BOS_CONFIRMATION_AND_LTF_CASCADE
children._annotation: MODIFIED (bias-init enforcement): Added htf_bias and ltf_bias to inputs. BOS direction is validated against htf_bias before cascade refinement begins — a BOS in the wrong direction relative to htf_bias is discarded immediately rather than being refined on LTF.
children.decision_logic: After Tap3, searches for a Break of Structure (BOS) — a candle that CLOSES above the highest point between Tap2 and Tap3 (bullish) or below the lowest point (bearish). Cascades through lower timeframes (5m → 1m) to find the earliest confirmation for best risk-reward. Lowest TF BOS overwrites higher TF BOS.

conditions.mtf_bos_search: On the schematic timeframe, find first candle CLOSE beyond the swing high/low between Tap2-Tap3
conditions.ltf_cascade: After MTF BOS found, search 5m then 1m for earlier BOS — LOWEST TF wins (best R:R)
conditions.bos_staleness_check: BOS must occur within MAX_STALE candles of Tap3 (varies by TF: 1d=2, 4h=3, 1h=3, 30m=4, 5m=10, 1m=30). If exceeded → STALE → REJECT
conditions.ltf_internal_structure: Primary: search for BOS using internal structure swings between Tap2-Tap3 timestamps
conditions.ltf_fallback: If no internal structure, use post-Tap3 swings as fallback BOS points
conditions.eq_filter_v1: In v1 mode: BOS must be below EQ for accumulation, above EQ for distribution
conditions.hard_gate: If no BOS found on any timeframe → HARD FAIL → cannot enter trade

children.name: LTF_BOS_REFINEMENT
children.decision_logic: Fetches LTF candles around the MTF BOS zone. Identifies LTF swing structure and finds first LTF BOS (close beyond LTF swing). If found, uses LTF BOS price as entry and LTF swing extreme as stop — tighter risk, better R:R.

conditions.1m_override: If 1m BOS found, it overwrites 5m BOS (tighter = better)
conditions.no_ltf_found: If no LTF BOS → fall back to MTF BOS levels

children.name: GATING_CHECKS
children._annotation: MODIFIED (bias-init enforcement): Added ltf_bias from step 2.3 to inputs alongside existing htf_bias. Both bias values are now threaded into all child gate steps (6.1, 6.7) to enable full HTF+LTF alignment validation.
children.decision_logic: Series of hard gates that must ALL pass before scoring proceeds. Any single hard gate failure results in immediate rejection — the trade is NOT taken regardless of other factors.

conditions.HARD_GATES: ALL must pass or trade is rejected

children.name: HTF_LTF_ALIGNMENT_GATE
children._annotation: MODIFIED (bias-init enforcement): Renamed from HTF_ALIGNMENT_GATE to HTF_LTF_ALIGNMENT_GATE. Added ltf_bias to inputs. Gate now evaluates full HTF+LTF alignment: both biases must agree with schematic direction. A schematic that aligns with htf_bias but opposes ltf_bias is allowed only if ltf_bias == 'counter' and RIG (step 6.7) passes.
children.decision_logic: Checks that the trade direction aligns with both HTF and LTF bias. Counter-bias trades (e.g., bearish setup during bullish HTF) are typically rejected.

conditions.full_pass: htf_bias == schematic.direction AND ltf_bias == schematic.direction → strongest signal
conditions.htf_only_pass: htf_bias == schematic.direction AND ltf_bias == 'counter' → allowed only if RIG gate (step 6.7) passes
conditions.fail_hard_htf: htf_bias is OPPOSITE to schematic.direction → REJECT regardless of ltf_bias
conditions.exception_neutral: htf_bias == 'neutral' → HARD FAIL in v2 (neutral = uncertain = no entry)
conditions.exception_trend_shift: If CHoCH (Change of Character) detected in HTF → counter-bias entry MAY be allowed

children.name: BOS_CONFIRMATION_GATE
children.decision_logic: Requires confirmed BOS. Without structural confirmation, no trade.

children.name: RISK_REWARD_GATE
children.decision_logic: Calculates live risk-to-reward ratio. Hard floor of 1.5. Trades below this threshold are never taken.

conditions.calculation: live_risk = abs(entry_price - stop_price); live_reward = abs(target_price - entry_price); rr = live_reward / live_risk

children.name: SUPPLY_DEMAND_VALIDATION_GATE
children.decision_logic: Verifies that a valid supply or demand zone exists near Tap3. FVG is a 3-candle pattern leaving an unmitigated gap. OB is a swing-structure point (last opposing candle before impulse). At least one must be present in the correct zone.

conditions.for_bullish: Demand zone (FVG or OB) must exist BELOW or AT Tap3 level
conditions.for_bearish: Supply zone (FVG or OB) must exist ABOVE or AT Tap3 level
conditions.hard_gate: If NO FVG and NO OB near Tap3 → HARD FAIL (unless schematic already confirmed via other path)
conditions.fvg_definition: 3 consecutive candles where candle[1].low > candle[0].high (bullish) or candle[1].high < candle[0].low (bearish)

children.name: LIQUIDITY_SWEEP_VALIDATION_GATE
children.decision_logic: Classifies the liquidity event as SWEEP (acceptable) or TRUE BREAK (rejection). A sweep means price went beyond range but came back. A true break means price closed beyond DL2 and stayed there.

conditions.swept: Any candle low/high beyond range boundary but closes back inside → VALID sweep
conditions.deep_break: Candle CLOSES beyond DL2 but penetration ≥ 1% of range AND accepted back within ≥ 3 candles → VALID (soft pass)
conditions.true_break: Candle CLOSES beyond DL2 AND NOT accepted back within 3 candles → HARD FAIL
conditions.v2_tolerance: In v2, allow close slightly beyond DL2 if within 0.3% tolerance before classifying as true break

children.name: TCT_5A_SCHEMATIC_VALIDITY_GATE
children.decision_logic: Validates that the overall TCT 5A schematic structure is intact — range found, taps identified, model type classified, deviation within limits.

conditions.pass: schematic has valid range + valid taps + valid model type + deviation within DL2
conditions.fail_hard: Any core schematic element missing or invalid → HARD FAIL

children.name: COUNTER_BIAS_RANGE_INTEGRITY_GATE
children.decision_logic: Prevents counter-bias entries when the HTF range is still intact. If the higher timeframe range has held for 24+ hours and local displacement is weak, counter-bias entries are blocked.

conditions.hard_fail_if: HTF range intact (duration ≥ 24h) AND local displacement < 25% AND htf_bias ≠ session_bias → REJECT
conditions.exception_choch: If Change of Character (CHoCH) detected via domino effect (L3→L2→L1 confirmation) → bypass RIG
conditions.exception_model_flow: Model 1 → Model 2 conversion or schematic conversion → bypass allowed

children.name: COMPOSITE_SCORING
children._annotation: MODIFIED (bias-init enforcement): Added htf_bias and ltf_bias to inputs. The scoring engine now receives both bias values and uses them as a context signal across all scoring trees. A fully aligned HTF+LTF bias does not add bonus points but a counter ltf_bias applies a score penalty (−5 pts) via tree 5 (TCT 5B real-world) to reflect execution risk.
children.decision_logic: If all hard gates pass, computes a composite score from 0-100 across 6 scoring trees plus R:R bonus. Each tree contributes a weighted score. The total must meet or exceed the entry threshold (60 for v2, 50 for v1) to trigger trade entry.

children.name: TREE_1_RANGE_STRUCTURE
children.decision_logic: Scores the quality and validity of the identified consolidation range.

conditions.full_pass: Valid horizontal range with EQ touched and liquidity stacking → 20 pts
conditions.partial_pass: Range found but quality concerns → 10-15 pts
conditions.soft_fail: Range validation issues → 5 pts (does not reject, just low score)

children.name: TREE_2_SUPPLY_DEMAND
children.decision_logic: Scores the presence and quality of supply/demand zones near the entry area.

conditions.full_pass: FVG present and unmitigated in correct zone → 20 pts
conditions.hard_gate_fail: No FVG at all → HARD FAIL (overrides score, entire trade rejected)

children.name: TREE_3_LIQUIDITY
children.decision_logic: Scores the quality of the liquidity sweep event.

conditions.full_pass: Clean sweep classified and accepted back → 15 pts
conditions.partial_pass: Deep break but accepted back → 8-10 pts

children.name: TREE_4_TCT_5A
children.decision_logic: Scores the TCT 5A schematic pattern recognition quality.

children.name: TREE_5_TCT_5B_REAL_WORLD
children.decision_logic: Scores real-world execution factors — how clean the setup looks on actual charts vs theoretical patterns.

conditions.full_pass: Clean taps, good BOS distance (≥ 0.2%), proper spacing → 15 pts

children.name: TREE_6_ADVANCED_FLIP_ESCALATION
children.decision_logic: Bonus scoring for advanced pattern recognition — schematic flips, escalation setups, and multi-timeframe confluence signals.

children.name: RR_BONUS
children.decision_logic: Awards bonus points for excellent risk-to-reward ratios.

children.name: SESSION_TIMING_ADJUSTMENT
children.decision_logic: Adjusts score based on which trading session is active. Higher scores during high-volume sessions (London/NY overlap), lower during Asia/off-hours. NOT a hard gate — just moves the needle on total score.

children.name: TRADE_EXECUTION
children._annotation: MODIFIED (bias-init enforcement): Added htf_bias and ltf_bias to inputs. Both bias values are embedded in the execution plan metadata and persisted with the trade log (step 10.0) so that post-trade analysis can attribute outcomes to specific bias states.
children.decision_logic: If composite score >= threshold, generates a full execution plan including position sizing, margin requirements, and liquidation safety checks. Verifies that the liquidation price is safely beyond the stop loss before placing any order.

conditions.score_gate: composite_score >= threshold (50 v1 / 60 v2) → proceed to execution
conditions.below_threshold: composite_score < threshold → NO TRADE, log reason, continue scanning

children.name: POSITION_SIZING
children.decision_logic: Calculates position size based on fixed 1% risk per trade. Position = (balance × risk%) / |entry - stop| × leverage. Ensures margin does not exceed available balance.

conditions.margin_check: margin = position_size / leverage; must be ≤ available_balance
conditions.no_dynamic_scaling: Risk is FIXED at 1% — does not adjust based on confidence or score

children.name: LIQUIDATION_SAFETY_CHECK
children.decision_logic: Calculates the estimated liquidation price and verifies it is safely OUTSIDE the stop loss. This is non-negotiable per TCT Lecture 9 — liquidation must never be hit before stop loss.

conditions.long_danger: liquidation_price >= stop_price → DANGER: reduce leverage or reject
conditions.short_danger: liquidation_price <= stop_price → DANGER: reduce leverage or reject

children.name: ORDER_PLACEMENT
children.decision_logic: Generates the final order specification. Primary entry is MARKET order (95% of entries — at BOS confirmation). Limit orders used for partial take-profits.
outputs: order_spec: {type, side, size, price, sl, tp}

conditions.limit_alternative: LIMIT at refined LTF price — 5% of trades (better entry but may miss)

children.name: TRADE_MANAGEMENT
children.decision_logic: Once a trade is open, manages it through its lifecycle: partial take-profit at midpoint, trailing stop to breakeven, and final exit at TP or SL.

conditions.runs_every: Checked on each 60s scan cycle while position is open

children.name: PARTIAL_TAKE_PROFIT
children.decision_logic: When price reaches the midpoint between entry and target, close 50% of the position to lock in profit.

children.name: TRAILING_STOP_TO_BREAKEVEN
children.decision_logic: After partial TP is taken, move the stop loss to breakeven (entry price) to eliminate risk on remaining position.

conditions.trigger: After partial TP is closed → move SL to entry_price

children.name: FINAL_EXIT
children.decision_logic: Remaining position exits at full target (TP), secondary target (TP2), or stop loss (SL). Trade is then logged and state is cleared for next scan.

conditions.tp_hit_long: live_price >= target_price → close remaining at profit
conditions.tp_hit_short: live_price <= target_price → close remaining at profit
conditions.sl_hit_long: live_price <= stop_price → close at loss (or breakeven if trailed)
conditions.sl_hit_short: live_price >= stop_price → close at loss (or breakeven if trailed)
conditions.tp2_optional: If tp2_price set → close last portion at tp2 instead of tp1

children.name: STATE_PERSISTENCE_AND_RECOVERY
children.decision_logic: Persists all trade state to disk (JSON) and optionally syncs to GitHub data branch. On restart, loads persisted state, validates it, and resumes operation.

conditions.save_triggers: After every trade entry, partial TP, exit, and balance change
conditions.corruption_detection: On load: if entry_price=0 OR stop_price=0 OR target_price=0 → discard trade (treat as no open position)
conditions.github_sync: If GITHUB_TOKEN_2 env var present → push to data branch automatically

workflow.name: HTF_UPGRADE_MECHANISM
workflow.decision_logic: After finding a schematic on one timeframe, checks if a higher timeframe also shows a valid schematic at the same level. If so, upgrades the analysis to the HTF for more significant structure. Walks up the TF hierarchy: 30m → 1h → 4h → 1d.

conditions.upgrade_criteria: HTF schematic found at overlapping price levels AND same direction

workflow.name: ALTERNATIVE_EVALUATION_MODE_JACK
workflow.decision_logic: Alternative 5-tree evaluation pipeline that uses only the 4H timeframe. Scoring weights: market_structure=20, ranges=20, s/d=20, liquidity=15, tct_5a=25. Threshold = 50. Has its own set of hard gates (MS valid, FVG present, 5A confirmed).

conditions.activation: Selected via evaluator mode config (not default)
conditions.4h_exclusive: Only analyzes 4H timeframe — no LTF cascade

workflow.name: PO3_SCHEMATIC_MODE
workflow.decision_logic: Power of Three (PO3) detection from TCT Lecture 8. Identifies three-phase pattern: Range (accumulation/distribution) → Manipulation (liquidity sweep) → Expansion (breakout in intended direction). Uses RTZ quality scoring and stricter R:R minimum of 2.0.

conditions.phase_1_range: Horizontal consolidation identified (reuses range logic from step 3.0)
conditions.phase_2_manipulation: Aggressive breakout that stays within DL2 (false breakout / liquidity grab)
conditions.phase_3_expansion: Directional move in intended direction after manipulation
conditions.min_rr: R:R >= 2.0 (stricter than standard TCT minimum of 1.5)

workflow.name: NOTIFICATIONS_AND_DIAGNOSTICS
workflow.decision_logic: Sends notifications on key events (trade entry, partial TP, exit) via Telegram. Exposes diagnostic data via FastAPI endpoints and WebSocket for the live dashboard. Maintains last_debug state for UI rendering.

conditions.dashboard_updates: Pushed via WebSocket or polling every scan cycle

data_flow_summary.2_structure_analysis: Candles → 6CR Pivots (1D) → Swing H/L → HTF Bias [step 2.0–2.2] → LTF Bias derived from MTF candles (4H/1H/30M) [step 2.3] → htf_bias + ltf_bias propagated to ALL downstream steps (3.0–8.0)
data_flow_summary.3_range_detection: Candles + htf_bias + ltf_bias → Range boundaries → EQ + DL2
data_flow_summary.5_bos_confirmation: Post-Tap3 candles → MTF BOS → LTF cascade refinement
data_flow_summary.6_gating: All upstream → 7 hard gates (any fail = reject)
data_flow_summary.7_scoring: Gate results → 6 trees + bonus → composite score (0-100)
data_flow_summary.8_execution: Score ≥ threshold → position sizing → liquidation check → order placement
data_flow_summary.9_management: Open position → partial TP → trailing SL → final exit
data_flow_summary.10_persistence: All state → JSON on disk + GitHub sync

critical_failure_modes.description: HTF bias is neutral — v2 treats this as hard fail, preventing any entries during unclear market structure
critical_failure_modes.impact: May miss valid setups during transitional periods

critical_failure_modes.description: No FVG found near Tap3 — hard gate rejection even if all other criteria pass
critical_failure_modes.impact: FVG detection sensitivity directly controls entry frequency

critical_failure_modes.description: BOS staleness exceeds MAX_STALE candles — valid schematic rejected because confirmation came too late
Liquidation price inside stop loss — trade rejected at execution stage despite passing all scoring
critical_failure_modes.impact: Leverage too high for the risk distance — requires manual leverage adjustment

critical_failure_modes.description: Counter-bias entry blocked by RIG when trend shift IS occurring but CHoCH not yet confirmed
critical_failure_modes.impact: Early trend shifts may be systematically missed
